title: Medlife is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Medlife is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Medlife invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Medlife:
Medlife is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medlife!
